Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul J. Schumacher, Esq., Bingham McCutchen (213) 680-6776 for Respondent and Moving Party Morgan Stanley Dean Witter Reynolds & Co., Specht, Corriente and Askia
Michelle L. Landry, Esq., Sideman & Bancroft LLP (415) 392-1960 for Petitioner and Opposing Party Peckman
RULING:
A R G U E D; RESPONDENT MORGAN STANLEY DEAN WITTER REYNOLDS & C0, JAMES SPECHT, RODEL CORRIENTE AND KEMAL ASKIA'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is taken UNDER SUBMISSION.
